component.name: ProgressBar
component.description: A 4px-tall track with a coloured fill representing a completion percentage (0–100). Used to show course progress on cards and profile sections.
component.figmaNodeId: none — no Figma component set exists

when: Showing how far a learner has progressed through a course on a CardHorizontal or CardVertical
Displaying completion percentage on a profile or dashboard summary

antiPatterns.scenario: Using ProgressBar for loading spinners or indeterminate states
antiPatterns.reason: ProgressBar requires a known 0–100 value. Indeterminate loading needs a different pattern.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a spinner or skeleton component (not in scope for this library).

antiPatterns.reason: Values are clamped internally, but the intent is lost; callers should normalise their own data.
antiPatterns.alternative: Normalise the progress value to a 0–100 percentage before passing it.

purpose.default: Accent-coloured fill on a neutral track.

compositionPatterns.name: course-progress
compositionPatterns.description: ProgressBar placed beneath a course title inside a CardHorizontal to show completion.
